description_long: This object is a long, classic shotgun with a dark wooden stock and a metallic barrel. The stock is full-sized, extending from the butt to the receiver, and features a smooth, slightly curved design with a brown finish. The barrel is long and slender, with metallic components including the receiver, trigger guard, and sights, all of which have a dark, matte appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a gold or brass finish that stands out against the darker materials. The shotgun has a bolt-action mechanism, as evidenced by the visible bolt handle on the right side. There are no visible pump or lever mechanisms, and the overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A long, bolt-action shotgun with a dark wooden full stock, metallic barrel, and a rounded gold trigger guard. The design is classic and streamlined, with no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the end of the stock.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the wooden stock, the metallic barrel, the bolt handle, and the gold trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, emphasizing the shotgun's slim profile.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the bolt-action mechanism, the full stock, and the metallic barrel with its attachments.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, gold-colored with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
